title: Research Execution Pipeline capability & bottleneck audit; lock operational boundaries
handoff_scope: Pipeline diagnostic EDTS-PIPELINE-AUDIT-2026-07; Physical Acquisition Plan Sprint 7 template only
reason: Architecture rules alone do not acquire paywalled bytes or internal cavity geometry. An honest six-dimension audit prevents treating discovery/indexing as verification and prevents infinite digital-search loops.
decision: Admit EDTS-PIPELINE-AUDIT-2026-07 as the authoritative Research Execution Pipeline capability & limitations record.
Lock operational boundaries: public discovery → SOURCE_DISCOVERED; SOURCE_ACQUIRED needs human/API credentials; ASSERTION_VERIFIED needs token-anchor (or equivalent) validation.
Reaffirm Exact-Vehicle Isolation and CONTRADICTED-without-smoothing as FULLY_CAPABLE pipeline strengths.
Reaffirm PARTIALLY_AUTOMATED acquisition and AUTOMATED_TEXT_ONLY extraction as current ceilings.
Require Research Saturation declaration before Physical Acquisition Plan (Sprint 7) execution; template only until then.
Saturation percentages in the audit are RESEARCH_ESTIMATE_NOT_MEASURED — not hashed coverage scores.
Keep all 2019 F-450 REL-REG edges REAL_DATA_PROMOTION_BLOCKED with PROCEDURE_GENERATION_NOT_AUTHORIZED until byte parsing, hashing, and token-anchor extraction are connected.
Recommended decision remains EGS_V1_PROPOSAL_INFRASTRUCTURE_READY (synthetic fixtures cleared; real promotion blocked).
missing_evidence: Helm Inc. / commercial OEM portal API integration
Ingested WSM 501-14 and EWD PDF bytes with token-anchor verification for CFG-000001
